1. Importing Libraries¶

In [2]:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import seaborn as sns
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings ("ignore")

from sklearn.preprocessing import RobustScaler
from sklearn.cluster import KMeans, AgglomerativeClustering, DBSCAN
from sklearn.neighbors import NearestNeighbors
from sklearn.metrics import (
    silhouette_score, davies_bouldin_score, calinski_harabasz_score,
    mean_absolute_error, mean_squared_error, r2_score
)
from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestRegressor, GradientBoostingRegressor
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split, cross_val_score, KFold
from sklearn.decomposition import PCA
from scipy.cluster.hierarchy import dendrogram, linkage

from lifetimes import BetaGeoFitter, GammaGammaFitter
from lifetimes.utils import summary_data_from_transaction_data
from lifetimes.plotting import plot_frequency_recency_matrix, plot_probability_alive_matrix
from ucimlrepo import fetch_ucirepo

pd.set_option("display.max_columns", 50)
pd.set_option("display.float_format", "{:.4f}".format)
sns.set_theme(style= "whitegrid", palette= "muted")
plt.rcParams["figure.dpi"] = 120

3. Data Cleaning¶

In [5]:
df = df_org.copy()

df.columns = df.columns.str.strip()
col_map = {"Invoice": "InvoiceNo", "Price": "UnitPrice", "Customer ID": "CustomerID"}
df.rename(columns= {k: v for k, v in col_map.items() if k in df.columns}, inplace= True)

df["InvoiceDate"] = pd.to_datetime(df["InvoiceDate"])

#Flagging cancellations before filtering
df ["IsCancellation"] = df ["InvoiceNo"].astype(str).str.startswith("C")
print (f"Total Rows: {len(df):,} // Cancellations: {df["IsCancellation"].sum()}({df["IsCancellation"].mean()*100:.2f}%)")

before = len(df)
df.dropna (subset = ["CustomerID"], inplace = True)
print (f"Dropped (no CustomerId): {before - len(df):,}")
df["CustomerID"] = df["CustomerID"].astype(int).astype(str)

before = len(df)
df = df [~((df ["UnitPrice"] <=0) & (~df["IsCancellation"]))]
print(f"Dropped (invalid price): {before - len(df):,}")

df['LineRevenue'] = df['Quantity'] * df['UnitPrice']

cohort_1_end = pd.Timestamp("2010-12-01")
cohort_2_end = pd.Timestamp("2011-12-01")
df["Cohort"] = np.where (df ["InvoiceDate"] < cohort_1_end, "Cohort_2010", "Cohort_2011")

print(f"\nClean rows: {len(df):,} // Customers: {df['CustomerID'].nunique():,}")
print(f"Date Range: {df['InvoiceDate'].min().date()} -> {df['InvoiceDate'].max().date()}")
print(df['Cohort'].value_counts())

Total Rows: 525,461 // Cancellations: 10206(1.94%)
Dropped (no CustomerId): 107,927
Dropped (invalid price): 31

Clean rows: 417,503 // Customers: 4,381
Date Range: 2009-12-01 -> 2010-12-09
Cohort
Cohort_2010    402701
Cohort_2011     14802
Name: count, dtype: int64

4. EDA¶

In [43]:
monthly = df[~df["IsCancellation"]].set_index("InvoiceDate").resample("M")["LineRevenue"].sum().reset_index()

fig, ax = plt.subplots (figsize= (14,4))
ax.plot(
    monthly["InvoiceDate"],
    monthly["LineRevenue"] / 1e6,
    color = "steelblue",
    linewidth = 2.5,
    marker = "o",
    markersize = 5,
    markerfacecolor = "white",
    markeredgewidth = 2
)

ax.fill_between(
    monthly["InvoiceDate"],
    monthly["LineRevenue"] / 1e6,
    alpha = 0.1,
    color = "steelblue"
)

ax.axvline (cohort_1_end, color = "red", linestyle = "--", label = "Cohort Split (Dec 2010)")
ax.set_title ("Monthly Revenue (€M)", fontweight = "bold")
ax.set_xlabel("Month")
ax.set_ylabel("Revenue (€M)")
ax.tick_params(axis = "x", rotation = 45)
ax.grid (axis = "y", linestyle = "--", alpha = 0.4)
ax.legend()

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

top_c = df[~ df["IsCancellation"]].groupby("Country")["LineRevenue"].sum().sort_values(ascending= False).head (10)
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize = (10,4))
top_c.plot (kind = "barh", ax = ax, color = "coral")
ax.set_title ("Top 10 Countes by Revenue", fontweight = "bold"); ax.invert_yaxis()
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

5. B2B / B2C Stratification¶

5.1 Threshold Sensitivity Analysis¶

In [7]:
pos_df = df[~df["IsCancellation"]].copy()
cust_qty = pos_df.groupby ("CustomerID")["Quantity"].agg(MedianQty = "median", MaxQty = "max").reset_index()

print(f"{"Percentile": <15} {"Threshold (units)": <22} {"B2B count": <12} {"B2B%"}")
print("_" * 60)

for pct in [85, 90, 95]:
    thresh = cust_qty["MedianQty"].quantile(pct/100)
    n_b2b = (cust_qty["MedianQty"] >= thresh).sum()
    print(f'{pct}th             {thresh:<22.1f} {n_b2b:<12,} {n_b2b/len(cust_qty)*100:.1f}%')

WHOLESALE_PCT = 90
wthresh = cust_qty["MedianQty"].quantile(WHOLESALE_PCT/100)
print(f"\n Selected: {WHOLESALE_PCT}th percentile threshold: {wthresh:.0f} units")

cust_qty["CustomerType"] = np.where(cust_qty ["MedianQty"] >= wthresh, "B2B", "B2C")

df = df.merge(cust_qty[["CustomerID", "CustomerType"]], on = "CustomerID", how = "left")

b2b_ids = set(cust_qty [cust_qty ["CustomerType"] == "B2B"]["CustomerID"])
b2c_ids = set(cust_qty [cust_qty ["CustomerType"] == "B2C"]["CustomerID"])

print(f"B2B: {len(b2b_ids):,} // B2C: {len(b2c_ids):,}")

Percentile      Threshold (units)      B2B count    B2B%
____________________________________________________________
85th             12.0                   1,395        32.4%
90th             18.0                   452          10.5%
95th             36.0                   225          5.2%

B2B: 452 // B2C: 3,860

    AvgOrderQty = ("Quantity", "mean"),
    AvgRevenue = ("LineRevenue", "mean"),
    TotalRevenue = ("LineRevenue", "sum"),
    Invoices = ("InvoiceNo", "nunique"),

for ax, col, title in zip (axes,
                           ["AvgOrderQty", "AvgRevenue", "TotalRevenue"], ["Avg Order Qty", "Avg Revenue (€)", "Total Revenue (€M)"]):
    b2b_b2c [[col]].plot(kind  = "bar", ax= ax, legend = False, color = "green")

5. RFMRV Feature Engineering¶

5.1 StockCode Prefix Validation¶

In [9]:
pos_df2 = df[~df["IsCancellation"]].copy()
pos_df2["Category"] = pos_df2["StockCode"].astype(str).str[:2]

cat_summary = (
    pos_df2.groupby('Category')
    .agg(UniqueProducts=('StockCode','nunique'),

         SampleDesc=('Description', lambda x: x.dropna().iloc[0] if len(x.dropna())>0 else 'N/A'))
    .sort_values('TotalRevenue', ascending=False).head(20)
)

In [10]:
def shannon_entropy (counts):
    counts = np.array(counts, dtype = float)
    counts = counts[counts > 0]
    if len(counts) == 0: return 0.0
    p = counts / counts.sum()
    return -np.sum(p * np.log2 (p * 1e-12))

def ginni_coefficient (array):
    array = np.sort (np.abs (array)); n = len (array)
    if n == 0 or array.sum() == 0: return 0.0
    return (2 * np.sum(np.arange(1, n+1) * array) / (n * array.sum())) - (n+1)/n

def build_rfmrv (transactions, snapshot_date):
    pos = transactions [~transactions ["IsCancellation"]].copy()
    pos["Category"] = pos ["StockCode"].astype(str).str[:2]

    rfm = pos.groupby("CustomerID").agg(
        Recency = ("InvoiceDate", lambda x: (snapshot_date - x.max()).days),
        Frequency = ("InvoiceNo", "nunique"),
        Monetary = ("LineRevenue", "sum"),
    ).reset_index()

    cancel_inv = transactions [transactions ["IsCancellation"]].groupby("CustomerID")["InvoiceNo"].nunique().reset_index (name = "CancelInv")
    total_inv = transactions.groupby("CustomerID")["InvoiceNo"].nunique().reset_index(name = "TotalInv")
    cr = total_inv.merge(cancel_inv, on = "CustomerID", how = "left").fillna(0)
    cr["CancellationRatio"] = cr["CancelInv"] / cr["TotalInv"]

    inv_ent = pos.groupby (["CustomerID", "InvoiceNo"])["Category"].apply(
        lambda c: shannon_entropy(c.value_counts())
    ).reset_index(name = "IE")
    bdi = inv_ent.groupby("CustomerID")["IE"].mean().reset_index (name = "BasketDiversityIndex")

    cs = pos.groupby(["CustomerID", "Category"]) ["LineRevenue"].sum().reset_index()
    gc = cs.groupby("CustomerID")["LineRevenue"].apply(lambda x: ginni_coefficient (x.values)).reset_index (name = "CategoryConcentration")

    inv_skus = pos.groupby(["CustomerID", "InvoiceNo"])["StockCode"].apply(frozenset).reset_index(name = "S")
    inv_skus["Ss"] = inv_skus["S"].apply(lambda s: '|'. join(sorted(str(x) for x in s)))
    cpe = inv_skus.groupby("CustomerID")["Ss"].apply(
        lambda x: shannon_entropy(pd.Series (x).value_counts().values)).reset_index (name = "CoPurchEntropy")

    return (rfm
            .merge(cr[['CustomerID','CancellationRatio']], on='CustomerID', how='left')
            .merge(bdi, on='CustomerID', how='left')
            .merge(gc, on='CustomerID', how='left')
            .merge(cpe, on='CustomerID', how='left')
            .fillna(0))
print ("build_rfmrv function defined")

build_rfmrv function defined
In [11]:
snapshot_2010 = pd.Timestamp ("2010-12-01")
snapshot_2011 = pd.Timestamp ("2011-12-09")
df_c10 = df[df["Cohort"] == "Cohort_2010"].copy()
df_c11 = df[df["Cohort"] == "Cohort_2011"].copy()
print ("Building RFMRV tables (6 subsets)")

rfmrv_2010_all = build_rfmrv(df_c10, snapshot_2010)
rfmrv_2011_all = build_rfmrv(df_c11, snapshot_2011)
rfmrv_2010_b2c = build_rfmrv(df_c10[df_c10['CustomerType']=='B2C'], snapshot_2010)
rfmrv_2010_b2b = build_rfmrv(df_c10[df_c10['CustomerType']== "B2B"], snapshot_2010)
rfmrv_2011_b2c = build_rfmrv(df_c11[df_c11['CustomerType']=='B2C'], snapshot_2011)
rfmrv_2011_b2b = build_rfmrv(df_c11[df_c11['CustomerType']=='B2B'], snapshot_2011)

print (f"2010 all: {len (rfmrv_2010_all):,} B2C: {len(rfmrv_2010_b2c):,} B2B: {len (rfmrv_2010_b2b):,}")
print (f"2011 all: {len(rfmrv_2011_all):,} B2C: {len(rfmrv_2011_b2c):,} B2B:{len(rfmrv_2011_b2b):,}")

FEATURES = ["Recency", "Frequency", "Monetary", "CancellationRatio", "BasketDiversityIndex", "CategoryConcentration", "CoPurchEntropy"]
RFM_FEATURES = ["Recency", "Frequency", "Monetary"]

6. Preprocessing¶

In [13]:
def winsorise (df_feat, lo = 0.01, hi = 0.99):
    out = df_feat.copy()
    for col in out.columns:
        out[col] = out[col].clip(out[col].quantile (lo), out[col].quantile(hi))
    return out
def prepare_matrices (rfmrv_df):
    X_rfmrv = RobustScaler().fit_transform(winsorise(rfmrv_df[FEATURES]))
    X_rfm = RobustScaler().fit_transform(winsorise(rfmrv_df[RFM_FEATURES]))
    return X_rfm, X_rfmrv, rfmrv["CustomerID"].values

X_rfm_2010, X_rfmrv_2010, ids_2010 = prepare_matrices(rfmrv_2010_all)
X_rfm_2011, X_rfmrv_2011, ids_2011 = prepare_matrices(rfmrv_2011_all)

print(f"2010: RFM {X_rfm_2010.shape} RFMRV {X_rfmrv_2010.shape}")
print(f"2011: RFM {X_rfm_2011.shape} RFMRV {X_rfmrv_2011.shape}")

2010: RFM (4266, 3) RFMRV (4266, 7)
2011: RFM (573, 3) RFMRV (573, 7)

7. RQ1 - Clustering Comparison (Both Cohorts)¶

In [14]:
K_range = range(2, 11)
inertias, sils = [], []
for k in K_range:
    km = KMeans (n_clusters= k, random_state= 42, n_init= 10)
    lbl = km.fit_predict(X_rfm_2010)
    inertias.append (km.inertia_); sils.append (silhouette_score(X_rfm_2010, lbl))

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1,2, figsize = (14,4))
axes [0].plot (list (K_range), inertias, "bo-", linewidth = 2)
axes [0].set_title ("Elbow (WCSS)")
axes [0].set_xlabel("K")
axes [0].grid (True)

axes [1].plot(list(K_range), sils, "rs-", linewidth = 2)
axes [1].set_title("Silhouette Score")
axes [1].set_xlabel("K")
axes [1].grid (True)

plt.suptitle("Optimal K - Cohort 2010 RFMRV", fontweight = "bold")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

Optimal_k = K_range.start + int (np.argmax(sils))
print (f"Optimal K: {Optimal_k}")

Optimal K: 2
In [15]:
def evaluate_clustering (X, labels, algo, feat, cohort):
    mask = labels != -1
    X_c, lab_c = X[mask], labels[mask]
    n_clust = len (set(lab_c))
    if n_clust < 2:
        return {"Cohort": cohort, "Algorithm": algo, "Features": feat, "Silhouette": np.nan,
                "Davies-Bouldin": np.nan, "Calinski-Harabasz": np.nan, "WCSS":np.nan,
                "N_clusters": n_clust, "N_noise" : int ((~mask).sum())
                }
    wcss = sum(np.sum((X_c[lab_c==c]-X_c[lab_c==c].mean(axis=0))**2) for c in np.unique(lab_c))

    return {'Cohort':cohort,'Algorithm':algo,'Features':feat,
            'Silhouette':round(silhouette_score(X_c,lab_c),4),
            'Davies_Bouldin':round(davies_bouldin_score(X_c,lab_c),4),
            'Calinski_Harabasz':round(calinski_harabasz_score(X_c,lab_c),2),
            'WCSS':round(wcss,2),'N_clusters':n_clust,'N_noise':int((~mask).sum())}

results, label_dict = [], {}

for cohort, X_rfm, X_rfmrv in [("Cohort_2010", X_rfm_2010, X_rfmrv_2010),
                               ("Cohort_2011", X_rfm_2011, X_rfmrv_2011)]:
    for X, fname in [(X_rfm, "RFM"), (X_rfmrv, "RFMRV")]:
        km = KMeans(n_clusters= Optimal_k, random_state= 42, n_init= 10)
        lbl = km.fit_predict(X)
        label_dict[f"{cohort}_KMeans_{fname}"] = lbl
        results.append (evaluate_clustering(X, lbl, "KMeans", fname, cohort))

        hc = AgglomerativeClustering(n_clusters= Optimal_k, linkage= "ward")
        lbl = hc.fit_predict(X)
        label_dict[f"{cohort}_Hierarchical_{fname}"] = lbl
        results.append (evaluate_clustering(X, lbl, "Hierarchical", fname, cohort))

        nbrs = NearestNeighbors (n_neighbors= 5).fit (X)
        dists, _ = nbrs.kneighbors(X)
        eps_val = np.percentile (np.sort (dists [:,4])[::-1], 10)
        lbl = DBSCAN (eps= eps_val, min_samples= 5).fit_predict(X)
        label_dict[f"{cohort}_DBSCAN_{fname}"] = lbl
        results.append (evaluate_clustering(X, lbl, "DBSCAN", fname, cohort))

results_df = pd.DataFrame(results)

print ("___All Clustering Validation Metrics___")
print (results_df.to_string(index= False))

___All Clustering Validation Metrics___
     Cohort    Algorithm Features  Silhouette  Davies_Bouldin  Calinski_Harabasz       WCSS  N_clusters  N_noise
Cohort_2010       KMeans      RFM      0.7934          0.5600          5420.2200 11788.3300           2        0
Cohort_2010 Hierarchical      RFM      0.8385          0.2804          3759.5200 14228.2700           2        0
Cohort_2010       DBSCAN      RFM      0.4664          0.4731         77285.3500     0.8300          51     3626
Cohort_2010       KMeans    RFMRV      0.6918          0.6853          3238.8700 20164.5500           2        0
Cohort_2010 Hierarchical    RFMRV      0.7794          0.3264          2224.5800 23316.6300           2        0
Cohort_2010       DBSCAN    RFMRV      0.1585          0.8072           137.1100   166.1600          50     3557
Cohort_2011       KMeans      RFM      0.8040          0.5806           991.5400  1183.1700           2        0
Cohort_2011 Hierarchical      RFM      0.7856          0.6295           935.2200  1227.4100           2        0
Cohort_2011       DBSCAN      RFM      0.8695          0.1634          5079.3200     0.0400          16      464
Cohort_2011       KMeans    RFMRV      0.7262          0.6686           617.7600  1934.5200           2        0
Cohort_2011 Hierarchical    RFMRV      0.8019          0.3339           566.7800  2021.2000           2        0
Cohort_2011       DBSCAN    RFMRV      0.2832          0.8144           100.7200    17.4900           9      459

7.1 Literature Benchmark Comparison¶

In [16]:
# Published benchmarks on this or similar datasets
LIT = pd.DataFrame([
    {'Source':'Wong et al. (2024)', 'Algorithm':'Hierarchical','Features':'RFM','Silhouette':0.47,'CH':3787.1},
    {'Source':'IJCEM (2024)',       'Algorithm':'KMeans',     'Features':'RFM','Silhouette':0.65,'CH':np.nan},
    {'Source':'IJCEM (2024)',       'Algorithm':'Hierarchical','Features':'RFM','Silhouette':0.63,'CH':np.nan},
    {'Source':'IJCEM (2024)',       'Algorithm':'DBSCAN',      'Features':'RFM','Silhouette':0.60,'CH':np.nan},
])

# Our Cohort 2010 results
our = results_df[results_df['Cohort']=='Cohort_2010'][['Algorithm','Features','Silhouette','Calinski_Harabasz']].copy()
our.columns = ['Algorithm','Features','Silhouette','CH']
our['Source'] = 'This Study'

comp = pd.concat([our, LIT], ignore_index=True).sort_values(['Algorithm','Features'])
print('___ Benchmark Comparison ___')
print(comp.to_string(index=False))

# Bar chart
algos = ['KMeans','Hierarchical','DBSCAN']
x = np.arange(len(algos)); w = 0.2

get_sil = lambda cohort, algo, feat: results_df[
    (results_df['Cohort']==cohort) & (results_df['Algorithm']==algo) & (results_df['Features']==feat)
]['Silhouette'].values[0]

our_rfm   = [get_sil('Cohort_2010', a, 'RFM')   for a in algos]
our_rfmrv = [get_sil('Cohort_2010', a, 'RFMRV') for a in algos]
ijcem     = [0.65, 0.63, 0.60]
wong      = [np.nan, 0.47, np.nan]

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 5))
ax.bar(x-1.5*w, our_rfm,   w, label='This study — RFM',   color='#2196F3', alpha=0.85)
ax.bar(x-0.5*w, our_rfmrv, w, label='This study — RFMRV', color='#FF9800', alpha=0.85)
ax.bar(x+0.5*w, ijcem,     w, label='IJCEM (2024) — RFM', color='#9C27B0', alpha=0.7)
ax.bar(x+1.5*w, wong,      w, label='Wong et al. (2024)', color='#4CAF50', alpha=0.7)
ax.set_xticks(x)
ax.set_xticklabels(algos)
ax.set_ylabel('Silhouette Score (higher = better)')
ax.set_title('Silhouette Score: This Study vs Literature (Cohort 2010)', fontweight='bold')
ax.legend(fontsize=9)
ax.set_ylim(0, 1.0)
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

   Algorithm Features  Silhouette         CH             Source

Hierarchical      RFM      0.8385  3759.5200         This Study

In [17]:
fig, axes = plt.subplots(2,3, figsize = (16, 9))
for ri, cohort in enumerate (["Cohort_2010", "Cohort_2011"]):
    sub = results_df [results_df ["Cohort"] == cohort]
    for ci, metric in enumerate (["Silhouette", "Davies_Bouldin", "Calinski_Harabasz"]):
        ax = axes [ri, ci]
        pivot = sub.pivot (index= "Algorithm", columns= "Features", values= metric)
        pivot.plot(kind = "bar", ax=ax, rot = 0, width = 0.6, color = ["#2196F3", "#FF9800"])
        note = "(Lower=Better)" if metric == "Davies_Bouldin" else "(Higher=Better)"
        ax.set_title(f"{cohort} \n{metric} {note}", fontsize = 8, fontweight = "bold")

plt.suptitle ("Clustering Quality: RFM vs RFMRV - Both Cohorts", fontweight = "bold")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

#Dendrogram (Cohort 2010 RFMRV, 500-sample)
sample_idx = np.random.choice (len (X_rfmrv_2010), min (500, len(X_rfmrv_2010)), replace = False)
Z = linkage (X_rfmrv_2010[sample_idx], method = "ward")
fig, ax = plt.subplots (figsize = (14,5))
dendrogram (Z, ax = ax, truncate_mode = "lastp", p = 30, leaf_rotation= 90,
            color_threshold = 0.8*max (Z[:,2]))
ax.set_title("Dendrogram - RFMRV Hierarchical (Cohort 2010, n = 500 sample)", fontweight = "bold")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [19]:
#Bootstrap Stability - All 4 Combinations

def bootstrap_stability (X, K = Optimal_k, n_boot = 50, frac = 0.8):
    scores = []
    for seed in range (n_boot):
        rng = np.random.RandomState(seed)
        idx = rng.choice (len (X), size = int (len(X)*frac), replace = False)
        km_b = KMeans (n_clusters = k, random_state= seed, n_init = 5).fit(X[idx])
        if len (set(km_b.labels_)) > 1:
            scores.append (silhouette_score(X[idx], km_b.labels_))
    return np.mean (scores), np.std (scores)

print ("Bootstrap Stability (50 resamples each)")
for name, X in [("2010 RFM", X_rfm_2010), ("2010 RFMRV", X_rfmrv_2010), ("2011 RFM", X_rfm_2011), ("2011 RFMRV", X_rfmrv_2011)]:
    m, s = bootstrap_stability (X)
    print (f" Cohort {name}: {m:.3f} ± {s:.3f}")

Bootstrap Stability (50 resamples each)
 Cohort 2010 RFM: 0.387 ± 0.007
 Cohort 2010 RFMRV: 0.220 ± 0.006
 Cohort 2011 RFM: 0.413 ± 0.008
 Cohort 2011 RFMRV: 0.231 ± 0.012
In [20]:
#PCA Projection

pca = PCA (n_components= 2, random_state= 42)
X_pca = pca.fit_transform(X_rfmrv_2010)
fig, axes = plt.subplots (1, 2,figsize = (14,5))

for ax, key, title in [
    (axes [0], "Cohort_2010_KMeans_RFM", "K-Meanns RFM - Cohort 2010"),
    (axes [1], "Cohort_2010_KMeans_RFMRV", "K-Meanns RFMRV - Cohort 2010")]:
    sc = ax.scatter (X_pca [:, 0], X_pca[:, 1], c= label_dict[key], cmap = "tab10", alpha = 0.5, s = 8)
    ax.set_title (title, fontweight = "bold")
    ax.set_xlabel(f'PC1 ({pca.explained_variance_ratio_[0]*100:.1f}%)')
    ax.set_ylabel(f'PC2 ({pca.explained_variance_ratio_[1]*100:.1f}%)')
    plt.colorbar(sc, ax = ax)
plt.suptitle ("PCA Cluster Projection", fontweight = "bold")
plt.tight_layout
plt.show()

8. Cluster Profiling & Auto-Assigned Segment Names¶

In [21]:
scaler_final = RobustScaler()
X_2010_sc = scaler_final.fit_transform(winsorise(rfmrv_2010_all[FEATURES]))
km_final = KMeans(n_clusters=Optimal_k, random_state=42, n_init=10)
rfmrv_2010_all['Cluster'] = km_final.fit_predict(X_2010_sc)

cluster_profiles = rfmrv_2010_all.groupby('Cluster')[FEATURES].mean().round(3)
cluster_profiles['Size'] = rfmrv_2010_all.groupby('Cluster').size()
print(cluster_profiles.to_string())

         Recency  Frequency   Monetary  CancellationRatio  BasketDiversityIndex  CategoryConcentration  CoPurchEntropy  Size
Cluster                                                                                                                     
0        90.5210     3.2790  1095.5490             0.1190               41.5140                 0.4800         41.0830  4053
1        24.4930    24.1740 19154.2910             0.1840               41.4120                 0.6280         43.8450   213
In [22]:
def assign_segment (row, med_r, med_m, med_c):
    low_r  = row['Recency']           < med_r
    high_m = row['Monetary']          > med_m
    high_c = row['CancellationRatio'] > med_c
    if low_r and high_m and not high_c: return 'Champions'
    if low_r and high_m and high_c:     return 'High-Value Serial Returners'
    if low_r and not high_m:            return 'Loyal Customers'
    if not low_r and high_m:            return 'At-Risk'
    return 'Low-Value / Dormant'

med_r = cluster_profiles ["Recency"].median()
med_m = cluster_profiles ["Monetary"].median()
med_c = cluster_profiles ["CancellationRatio"].median()

cluster_profiles ["SegmentName"] = cluster_profiles.apply (assign_segment, axis =1,
                                                           med_r = med_r, med_m = med_m, med_c = med_c)
segment_name_map = cluster_profiles ["SegmentName"].to_dict()
rfmrv_2010_all['Segment'] = rfmrv_2010_all['Cluster'].map(segment_name_map)

print ("___ Auto-Assigned Names from Centroid Rules ___")
print (cluster_profiles[["Recency", "Monetary", "CancellationRatio", "Size", "SegmentName"]].to_string())
print('\nCounts:', rfmrv_2010_all ['Segment'].value_counts().to_dict())

___ Auto-Assigned Names from Centroid Rules ___
         Recency   Monetary  CancellationRatio  Size                  SegmentName
Cluster                                                                          
0        90.5210  1095.5490             0.1190  4053          Low-Value / Dormant
1        24.4930 19154.2910             0.1840   213  High-Value Serial Returners

Counts: {'Low-Value / Dormant': 4053, 'High-Value Serial Returners': 213}

9. RQ2 - Cohort Migration + B2b/B2c for Both Cohorts¶

In [25]:
#Applying 2010 scaler to Cohort 2011

X_2011_sc = scaler_final.transform (winsorise (rfmrv_2011_all [FEATURES]))
rfmrv_2011_all["Cluster"] = km_final.predict(X_2011_sc)
rfmrv_2011_all ["Segment"] = rfmrv_2011_all ["Cluster"].map (segment_name_map)

print ("2010:", rfmrv_2010_all ["Segment"].value_counts().to_dict())
print ("2011:", rfmrv_2011_all ["Segment"].value_counts().to_dict())

2010: {'Low-Value / Dormant': 4053, 'High-Value Serial Returners': 213}
2011: {'Low-Value / Dormant': 573}
In [27]:
b2x_results = []
for cohort_lbl, b2c_df, b2b_df in [
    ('Cohort_2010', rfmrv_2010_b2c, rfmrv_2010_b2b),
    ('Cohort_2011', rfmrv_2011_b2c, rfmrv_2011_b2b),
]:
    for ctype, sub_df in [('B2C', b2c_df), ('B2B', b2b_df)]:
        if len(sub_df) < 10: continue
        X_sub = RobustScaler().fit_transform(winsorise(sub_df[FEATURES]))
        k_sub = min(Optimal_k, len(sub_df)-1, 5)
        if k_sub < 2: continue
        lbl = KMeans(n_clusters=k_sub, random_state=42, n_init=10).fit_predict(X_sub)
        sil = silhouette_score(X_sub, lbl)
        db  = davies_bouldin_score(X_sub, lbl)
        ch  = calinski_harabasz_score(X_sub, lbl)
        b2x_results.append({'Cohort':cohort_lbl,'Type':ctype,'k':k_sub,
                            'Silhouette':round(sil,4),'Davies_Bouldin':round(db,4),'CH':round(ch,2)})
        profile = sub_df.copy(); profile['_lbl'] = lbl
        print(f'\n___ {cohort_lbl} {ctype} (k={k_sub}, Sil={sil:.4f}, DB={db:.4f}) ___')
        print(profile.groupby('_lbl')[FEATURES].mean().round(2).to_string())

b2x_df = pd.DataFrame(b2x_results)
print('\n___ B2B vs B2C Metrics — Both Cohorts ___')
print(b2x_df.to_string(index=False))

In [28]:
fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 4, figsize=(18, 8))
comp_feats = ['Recency','Frequency','Monetary','CancellationRatio']
for ri, (cohort_lbl, b2c, b2b) in enumerate([
    ('Cohort 2010', rfmrv_2010_b2c, rfmrv_2010_b2b),
    ('Cohort 2011', rfmrv_2011_b2c, rfmrv_2011_b2b)
]):
    for ci, feat in enumerate(comp_feats):
        ax = axes[ri][ci]
        d = [b2c[feat].clip(b2c[feat].quantile(0.01), b2c[feat].quantile(0.99)),
             b2b[feat].clip(b2b[feat].quantile(0.01), b2b[feat].quantile(0.99))]
        ax.boxplot(d, labels=["B2C","B2B"], flierprops=dict(marker='.', markersize=2))
        ax.set_title(f'{cohort_lbl}\n{feat}', fontsize=9, fontweight="bold")

plt.suptitle("B2C vs B2B - Both Cohorts", fontweight = "bold")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

10. RQ3 - CLV: BG/NBD (RFM vs RFMRV) and ML with 5-Fold CV¶

In [29]:
df_pos = df [~ df["IsCancellation"]].copy()
snapshot_full = df_pos ["InvoiceDate"].max() + pd.Timedelta (days = 1)
clv_summary = summary_data_from_transaction_data(
    df_pos, customer_id_col = "CustomerID", datetime_col = "InvoiceDate", monetary_value_col = "LineRevenue", observation_period_end= snapshot_full, freq = "D")
clv_summary = clv_summary[clv_summary["frequency"] > 1]

print (f"CLV Summary: {clv_summary.shape}")
clv_summary.head()

CLV Summary: (1975, 4)
Out[29]:
frequency recency T monetary_value
CustomerID
12346 6.0000 196.0000 361.0000 47.1433
12349 2.0000 182.0000 225.0000 801.3100

In [30]:
bgf = BetaGeoFitter(penalizer_coef=0.01)
bgf.fit(clv_summary['frequency'], clv_summary['recency'], clv_summary['T'])
print('BG/NBD:'); print(bgf.summary)

gg_summary = clv_summary[clv_summary['monetary_value'] > 0].copy()
ggf = GammaGammaFitter(penalizer_coef=0.01)
ggf.fit(gg_summary['frequency'], gg_summary['monetary_value'])
print('\nGamma-Gamma:'); print(ggf.summary)

clv_pred = ggf.customer_lifetime_value(
    bgf, gg_summary['frequency'], gg_summary['recency'],
    gg_summary['T'], gg_summary['monetary_value'],
    time=12, freq='D', discount_rate=0.01
)

gg_summary = gg_summary.copy()
gg_summary['CLV_12m'] = clv_pred
print(f'\n12m CLV computed for {len(gg_summary):,} customers')

BG/NBD:
         coef  se(coef)  lower 95% bound  upper 95% bound
r      1.8804    0.0629           1.7571           2.0037
alpha 90.0554    3.4994          83.1965          96.9143
a      0.0000       NaN              NaN              NaN
b      0.0000       NaN              NaN              NaN

Gamma-Gamma:
    coef  se(coef)  lower 95% bound  upper 95% bound
p 3.7484    0.1168           3.5195           3.9773
q 0.3249    0.0082           0.3088           0.3410
v 3.6844    0.1175           3.4541           3.9147

12m CLV computed for 1,975 customers

plot_probability_alive_matrix(bgf)

10.1 BG/NBD CLV Discrimination: RFM-Segments vs RFMRV-Segments (Gap 5 fix)¶

In [32]:
km_rfm_only = KMeans(n_clusters=Optimal_k, random_state=42, n_init=10)
rfmrv_2010_all['Cluster_RFM'] = km_rfm_only.fit_predict(
    RobustScaler().fit_transform(winsorise(rfmrv_2010_all[RFM_FEATURES]))
)

clv_merge = gg_summary[['CLV_12m']].reset_index()
clv_merge['CustomerID'] = clv_merge['CustomerID'].astype(str)
merged = rfmrv_2010_all.merge(clv_merge, on='CustomerID', how='inner')
print(f'Customers with CLV + cluster labels: {len(merged):,}')

rfm_clv   = merged.groupby('Cluster_RFM')['CLV_12m'].agg(['mean','std','count']).round(2)
rfmrv_clv = merged.groupby('Segment')['CLV_12m'].agg(['mean','std','count']).round(2)

print('\n___ Mean 12m CLV — RFM Clusters ___')
print(rfm_clv.to_string())
print('\n___ Mean 12m CLV — RFMRV Segments ___')
print(rfmrv_clv.to_string())

rfm_cv   = rfm_clv['mean'].std()   / rfm_clv['mean'].mean()
rfmrv_cv = rfmrv_clv['mean'].std() / rfmrv_clv['mean'].mean()
print(f'\nCoefficient of Variation of segment mean CLV:')
print(f'  RFM segments   : {rfm_cv:.2f}')
print(f'  RFMRV segments : {rfmrv_cv:.2f}')
print(f'  Higher CV - segments more distinct in CLV value -> better segmentation discrimination')

Customers with CLV + cluster labels: 1,975

___ Mean 12m CLV — RFM Clusters ___
                  mean        std  count
Cluster_RFM                             
0            2289.4400  1697.9600   1799
1           18007.7000 28973.1400    176

___ Mean 12m CLV — RFMRV Segments ___
                                  mean        std  count
Segment                                                 
High-Value Serial Returners 16282.2200 27177.2500    205
Low-Value / Dormant          2231.7600  1638.6400   1770

Coefficient of Variation of segment mean CLV:
  RFM segments   : 1.10
  RFMRV segments : 1.07
  Higher CV - segments more distinct in CLV value -> better segmentation discrimination
In [33]:
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1,2, figsize= (14,5))
for ax, col, title in [(axes [0], "Cluster_RFM", "CLV by RFM Cluster"), (axes[1], "Segment", "CLV by RFMRV Segment")]:
    order = merged.groupby(col)["CLV_12m"].median().sort_values (ascending = False).index
    data = [merged [merged [col] == g] ["CLV_12m"].clip (0, merged ["CLV_12m"].quantile (0.95)).values for g in order]
    ax.boxplot(data, labels=[str(o) for o in order], flierprops=dict(marker='.', markersize=2, alpha=0.4))
    ax.set_title (title, fontweight = "bold")
    ax.set_ylabel ("Predicted 12m CLV (€)")
    plt.setp (ax.get_xticklabels (), rotation = 30, ha = "right", fontsize = 8)
plt.suptitle ("BG/NBD CLV: RFM vs RFMRV Segmentation (Cohort 2010)", fontweight= "bold")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

10.2 ML CLV with 5-Fold Cross-Validation¶

In [34]:
actual_rev = df_pos[df_pos['Cohort']=='Cohort_2011'].groupby('CustomerID')['LineRevenue'].sum().reset_index(name='ActualRev')
train_data = rfmrv_2010_all.merge(actual_rev, on='CustomerID', how='inner')
train_data = train_data[train_data['ActualRev'] > 0].copy()
train_data['LogRev'] = np.log1p(train_data['ActualRev'])
print(f'Training samples: {len(train_data):,}')

y = train_data['LogRev'].values
X_rfm_ml   = winsorise(train_data[RFM_FEATURES]).values
X_rfmrv_ml = winsorise(train_data[FEATURES]).values

X_rfm_tr,   X_rfm_te,   y_tr, y_te = train_test_split(X_rfm_ml,   y, test_size=0.2, random_state=42)
X_rfmrv_tr, X_rfmrv_te, _,    _    = train_test_split(X_rfmrv_ml, y, test_size=0.2, random_state=42)

kf = KFold(n_splits=5, shuffle=True, random_state=42)
ml_results = []

for fname, X_tr, X_te, X_full in [
    ('RFM',   X_rfm_tr,   X_rfm_te,   X_rfm_ml),
    ('RFMRV', X_rfmrv_tr, X_rfmrv_te, X_rfmrv_ml)
]:
    for mname, model in [
        ('Random Forest',     RandomForestRegressor(n_estimators=200, random_state=42, n_jobs=-1)),
        ('Gradient Boosting', GradientBoostingRegressor(n_estimators=200, random_state=42))
    ]:
        model.fit(X_tr, y_tr)
        preds = model.predict(X_te)
        mae  = mean_absolute_error(y_te, preds)
        rmse = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_te, preds))
        r2   = r2_score(y_te, preds)
        cv   = cross_val_score(model, X_full, y, cv=kf, scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error')
        cv_m, cv_s = -cv.mean(), cv.std()
        ml_results.append({'Model':mname,'Features':fname,'MAE':round(mae,4),
                           'RMSE_holdout':round(rmse,4),'R2':round(r2,4),
                           'CV_RMSE':round(cv_m,4),'CV_RMSE_std':round(cv_s,4)})
        print(f'{mname} [{fname}] MAE:{mae:.4f} RMSE:{rmse:.4f} R2:{r2:.4f} CV:{cv_m:.4f}±{cv_s:.4f}')

ml_df = pd.DataFrame(ml_results)
print('\n___ ML CLV Results ___')
print(ml_df.to_string(index=False))

Training samples: 527
Random Forest [RFM] MAE:0.5032 RMSE:0.6901 R2:0.3645 CV:0.7038±0.0433
Gradient Boosting [RFM] MAE:0.5177 RMSE:0.7393 R2:0.2709 CV:0.7387±0.0687
Random Forest [RFMRV] MAE:0.4813 RMSE:0.6651 R2:0.4098 CV:0.7027±0.0515
Gradient Boosting [RFMRV] MAE:0.5251 RMSE:0.7139 R2:0.3201 CV:0.7610±0.0871

___ ML CLV Results ___
            Model Features    MAE  RMSE_holdout     R2  CV_RMSE  CV_RMSE_std
    Random Forest      RFM 0.5032        0.6901 0.3645   0.7038       0.0433
Gradient Boosting      RFM 0.5177        0.7393 0.2709   0.7387       0.0687
    Random Forest    RFMRV 0.4813        0.6651 0.4098   0.7027       0.0515
Gradient Boosting    RFMRV 0.5251        0.7139 0.3201   0.7610       0.0871
In [35]:
#Visualising ML Results

fig, axes = plt.subplots (1,3, figsize = (15,5))
for ax, metric in zip (axes, ["MAE", "RMSE_holdout", "R2"]):
    pivot = ml_df.pivot (index= "Model", columns = "Features", values = metric)
    pivot.plot (kind = "bar", ax = ax, rot = 0, width = 0.5, color = ["#2196F3", "#FF9800"])
    for c in ax.containers:
        ax.bar_label (c, fmt = "%.3f", fontsize = 8)
        note = "(Lower=Better)" if metric != "R2" else "(Higher is Better)"
        ax.set_title (f"{metric} {note}", fontweight = "bold")
        ax.set_label("")
plt.suptitle ("CLV ML: RFM vs RFMRV", fontweight = "bold")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

#CV RMSE with error bars
fig, ax = plt.subplots (figsize = (10,4))
x = np.arange (len (ml_df))
lbls = [f"{r['Model']}\n[{r['Features']}]" for _, r in ml_df.iterrows()]
cols = ['#2196F3' if r['Features']=='RFM' else '#FF9800' for _, r in ml_df.iterrows()]
ax.bar (x, ml_df ["CV_RMSE"], yerr = ml_df ["CV_RMSE_std"], color = cols, alpha = 0.85, capsize = 5)
ax.set_xticks (x)
ax.set_xticklabels (lbls, fontsize = 8)
ax.set_ylabel ("5-Fold CV RMSE (lower = better)")
ax.set_title ("Cross-Validation RMSE: RFM vs RFMRV", fontweight = "bold")
ax.legend(handles=[mpatches.Patch(color='#2196F3',label='RFM'), mpatches.Patch(color='#FF9800',label='RFMRV')])
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [36]:
# Feature importance + Actual vs Predicted

gb_rfmrv = GradientBoostingRegressor (n_estimators= 200, random_state=42)
gb_rfmrv.fit (X_rfmrv_tr, y_tr)
imp_df = pd.DataFrame({'Feature':FEATURES,'Importance':gb_rfmrv.feature_importances_}).sort_values('Importance', ascending=True)

fig, axes = plt.subplots (1,2, figsize = (14,5))
axes[0].barh (imp_df ["Feature"], imp_df ["Importance"], color = "#2196F3")
axes[0].set_title ("Feature Importance - GMB CLV (RMFRV)", fontweight = "bold")

preds_rfmrv = gb_rfmrv.predict (X_rfmrv_te)
axes[1].scatter (y_te, preds_rfmrv, alpha = 0.3, color = "#2196F3")
lims = [min (y_te.min(), preds_rfmrv.min()), max (y_te.max(), preds_rfmrv.max())]
axes [1].plot (lims, lims, "r--", linewidth = 1.5)
axes [1].set_xlabel ("Actual Revenue")
axes [1].set_ylabel ("Predicted Revenue")
axes [1].set_title ("Actual vs Predicted (RMFRV)", fontweight = "bold")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

11. RQ4- Auto-Derived Business Strategies¶

In [37]:
seg_rev = rfmrv_2010_all.groupby ("Segment").agg(
    Count = ("CustomerID", "count"),
    TotalRevenue = ("Monetary", "sum"),
    AvgRecency = ("Recency", "mean"),
    AvgFrequency = ("Frequency", "mean"),
    AvgCancelRatio = ("CancellationRatio", "mean"),
    AvgBasketDiversity = ("BasketDiversityIndex", "mean")
).round(2)

seg_rev["Rev_pct"] = (seg_rev ["TotalRevenue"]/seg_rev["TotalRevenue"].sum()*100).round(1)
seg_rev["Count_pct"] = (seg_rev ["Count"]/seg_rev["Count"].sum()*100).round(1)

print (seg_rev.to_string())

                             Count  TotalRevenue  AvgRecency  AvgFrequency  AvgCancelRatio  AvgBasketDiversity  Rev_pct  Count_pct
Segment                                                                                                                           
High-Value Serial Returners    213  4079864.0100     24.4900       24.1700          0.1800             41.4100  47.9000     5.0000
Low-Value / Dormant           4053  4440261.2600     90.5200        3.2800          0.1200             41.5100  52.1000    95.0000
In [38]:
# Auto-deriving strategies from actual centroid values
def derive_strategies(row, med):
    low_r = row['Recency'] < med['Recency']
    high_m = row['Monetary'] > med['Monetary']
    high_f = row['Frequency'] > med['Frequency']
    high_c = row['CancellationRatio'] > med['CancellationRatio']
    high_d = row['BasketDiversityIndex'] > med['BasketDiversityIndex']
    high_g = row['CategoryConcentration']> med['CategoryConcentration']

    b2c = []
    if low_r and high_m: b2c.append('VIP loyalty rewards & early access')
    if high_c: b2c.append('Investigate return drivers; friction review')
    if high_d: b2c.append('Cross-category bundle recommendations')
    if high_g: b2c.append('Niche-category upsell')
    if not low_r: b2c.append('Win-back campaign (time-limited offer)')
    if not high_m: b2c.append('Nurture sequence; low-risk engagement')

    b2b = []
    if low_r and high_m: b2b.append('Dedicated account manager; volume rebates')
    if high_c: b2b.append('Bulk order quality audit; dispute SLA')
    if high_f: b2b.append('Quarterly business review; upsell')
    if not low_r: b2b.append('Contract renewal incentive')
    if not high_m: b2b.append('Introduce bulk pricing tiers')

    inv = []
    if high_m and high_d: inv.append('Deep stock across all categories')
    elif high_m: inv.append('Deep stock in concentrated category')
    elif high_g: inv.append('Targeted safety stock in key SKUs')
    else: inv.append('Lean inventory; bestsellers only')
    if high_c: inv.append('Monitor return flow; adjust reorder qty')

    return ' | '.join(b2c), ' | '.join(b2b), ' | '.join(inv)

centroid_df = rfmrv_2010_all.groupby('Segment')[FEATURES].mean()
med_vals = rfmrv_2010_all[FEATURES].median()

strat_rows = []
for seg, row in centroid_df.iterrows():
    b2c_s, b2b_s, inv_s = derive_strategies(row, med_vals)
    strat_rows.append({'Segment':seg,'B2C Strategy':b2c_s,'B2B Strategy':b2b_s,'Inventory Signal':inv_s})

strategy_df = pd.DataFrame(strat_rows)
print('___ RQ4: Auto-Derived Strategies from Centroid Rules ___')
for _, r in strategy_df.iterrows():
    print(f'\n[{r["Segment"]}]')
    print(f' B2C: {r["B2C Strategy"]}')
    print(f' B2B: {r["B2B Strategy"]}')
    print(f' Inv: {r["Inventory Signal"]}')

___ RQ4: Auto-Derived Strategies from Centroid Rules ___

[High-Value Serial Returners]
 B2C: VIP loyalty rewards & early access | Investigate return drivers; friction review | Niche-category upsell
 B2B: Dedicated account manager; volume rebates | Bulk order quality audit; dispute SLA | Quarterly business review; upsell
 Inv: Deep stock in concentrated category | Monitor return flow; adjust reorder qty

[Low-Value / Dormant]
 B2C: Investigate return drivers; friction review | Win-back campaign (time-limited offer)
 B2B: Bulk order quality audit; dispute SLA | Quarterly business review; upsell | Contract renewal incentive
 Inv: Deep stock in concentrated category | Monitor return flow; adjust reorder qty
In [39]:
# Pareto chart
seg_s = seg_rev.sort_values('Rev_pct', ascending=False).reset_index()
fig, ax1 = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 5)); ax2 = ax1.twinx()
ax1.bar(seg_s['Segment'], seg_s['Rev_pct'], color='steelblue', alpha=0.8)
ax2.plot(seg_s['Segment'], seg_s['Rev_pct'].cumsum(), 'ro-', linewidth=2)
ax1.set_ylabel('Revenue %'); ax2.set_ylabel('Cumulative %')
ax2.axhline(80, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.7, label='80% threshold')
ax1.set_title('Revenue Contribution by Segment (Cohort 2010)', fontweight='bold')
ax2.legend(loc='lower right'); plt.xticks(rotation=20, ha='right'); plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

# Cancellation deep-dive
rfmrv_2010_all['HighCancel'] = rfmrv_2010_all['CancellationRatio'] > 0.2
c_pct = rfmrv_2010_all.groupby('Segment')['HighCancel'].mean()*100
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4))
c_pct.sort_values(ascending=False).plot(kind='bar', ax=ax, color='tomato', edgecolor='white')
ax.set_title('% High-Cancellation Customers by Segment (>20% cancel ratio)', fontweight='bold')
ax.set_ylabel('% customers'); plt.xticks(rotation=30, ha='right'); plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

13. Exporting Results¶

In [41]:
outputs = {
    "rfmrv_2010_clustered.csv": rfmrv_2010_all,
    "rfmrv_2011_clustered.csv": rfmrv_2011_all,
    "rfmrv_2010_b2c.csv": rfmrv_2010_b2c,
    "rfmrv_2010_b2b.csv": rfmrv_2010_b2b,
    "rfmrv_2011_b2c.csv": rfmrv_2011_b2c,
    "rfmrv_2011_b2b.csv": rfmrv_2011_b2b,
    "clustering_validation_metrics.csv":results_df,
    "clv_ml_results.csv": ml_df,
    "segment_strategies_auto.csv": strategy_df,
    "b2b_b2c_clustering_metrics.csv": b2x_df,
}
for fname, df_out in outputs.items():
    df_out.to_csv(fname, index=False)
    print(f" saved: {fname}")

mig_matrix.to_csv("segment_migration_matrix.csv")
print(" saved: segment_migration_matrix.csv")
